underlying_goal: Fix ESLint violations in src/cli.ts by refactoring functions to use named object parameters, following a structured workflow from Jira ticket to verified fix, and also create a reusable skill for this workflow
friction_detail: Claude used Python instead of Node.js for packaging the skill, and tried to inline the callback lazily instead of using the explicit named object params pattern the user wanted.
brief_summary: User wanted to create a reusable skill and then fix ESLint violations in cli.ts using named object params; achieved after two corrections where Claude used the wrong tool (Python) and took a lazy shortcut on the fix.
